# PUT to default graph creates content
endpoint: gsp_put
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: PUT /data?default with Turtle returns 204 (Jena Fuseki default for graph replace)

=== request
PUT /data?default
Content-Type: text/turtle

<http://example.org/a> <http://example.org/p> "v" .

=== response
204
